name: code-review
description: Critical, evidence-based code review skill for Claude Code: review uncommitted working-tree changes or a GitHub PR (reading its description and all comment threads first), produce a tiered findings table (Blocker → Nit). One skill for every reviewer model — it detects its own model and loads the matching reviewer profile (Fable 5 or Opus 4.8). Grounded in Anthropic system cards.
